text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm dropping by the dance studio to<n>pick up
something I left behind, when<n>Tamamo Cross
comes up to me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I don't suppose ya got some<n>free time? If
you do, mind comin' over<n>and watchin' us
practice?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Us four are helpin' put together this<n>
mummy-themed haunted house as<n>part of a local
event.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The idea is that the guests and a<n>mummy hunter
are gonna use toy<n>guns to take out the mummies
that<n>come at 'em.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's totally unscripted, so we're<n>practicin' our
ad-libbin'! Y'know, like<n>improv.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the mummies are up now, so<n>would you
mind sharing your<n>impressions after? The theme
is<n>"mopey mummies."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Thanks a bunch! 'Kay, watch closely!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ughhhrrrrawwwrrrrr... The trEAsUre...<n>iS miiiNe...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gruhhh... Grrrahhh... tHe feSTivAL<n>hAs cOMe!
YoU wiLL jOiN thE feStiVaL<n>toOoO!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I lament... that I couldn't care... for<n>more people...
Somebody, please... Let<n>me coddle youuu...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And I am mopey because... I'm<n>hungry. I haven't
eaten... so I'm going<n>to come and eat you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear... I wonder if you're peckish<n>because
you've not eaten enough<n>veggies? Let me whip
you up a little<n>something.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Creek! Throw in some rice<n>and miso
soup as well. Oh, and don't<n>forget to make
enough for seconds!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'll make you as many<n>servings as you
like. ♪ Eat up until<n>you're all full! Oh, I'm so
delighted to<n>be looking after you, Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I get as much of your cooking as Iwant... It's like I'm in heaven....Drool.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All your reasons for bein' mopey are<n>goin' out
the window! How come yer<n>all bein' such
friendly mummies?! Get<n>afta the people already!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'm famished. I've still<n>got plenty
of room!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's not the point!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Cut! Cut! Tama, how's this supposed<n>to work
when you're breakin'<n>character and crackin'
jokes?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry about that. Forgot what I was<n>doin'
there...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you. How'd we do? And don't<n>go easy on
us!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This is a disaster! Haunted houses<n>aren't
supposed to be funny!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know I shoulda stayed in character,<n>but Oguri
and Creek were bein' way<n>too ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, I apologize... That wasn't my<n>intention at
all...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, it comes naturally to some<n>folks.
Anyways, look, we gotta get<n>serious, stat.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We'll have a hunter for the real thing,<n>right?
Things'll work out so long as<n>the hunter plays it
straight.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I guess so. Who's playin' the<n>mummy hunter?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That'd be me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Why didn't ya say so?! And how<n>come yer over
here pretendin' to be a<n>mummy?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I thought a mummy hunter should try<n>and
understand how the mummies<n>feel... Am I
wrong?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Are ya still gonna be able to hunt 'em<n>if yer
empathizin' with 'em? Geez.<n>This sure isn't
lookin' good.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You should go study your own role<n>now. Do
some research. Watch a<n>movie about a hunter or
somethin'.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it. You're always so on top<n>of
everything, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No kiddin'... This is supposed to be<n>horror, but
it's turned into comedy<n>improv.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, why don't we use scary stage<n>effects to
make it more immersive?<n>They do say that
sounds and<n>sensations can heighten suspense.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Why don't we make the event<n>into a full-on
fright-fest? Let's have a<n>look around the
academy at night for<n>scary inspiration!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not a bad idea... but no way!<n>We can't
just hang around at school<n>until it's dark!
Y'know?
choice_data_list: It should be fine if I'm with you.
It should be fine if I'm with you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Th-the academy sure is scary at<n>night, huh?
Let's hurry up and find<n>somethin' we can use
for the event.<n>Like, how about the way our<n>
footsteps echo?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, speaking of footsteps, have you<n>heard the
rumors? They say a red<n>light comes chasing
after you if you go<n>running through the academy
at night.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Why're you talkin' about thatnow?! That's got nothin' to dowith the show!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Oh my. Do you... hear that?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
N-nope. Nope. Nopenopenope! I don't<n>hear
nothin'!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a red light. I wonder if it's the one<n>Creek was
talking about?
...red... tiful... arv... ous...☆

text_block_list.name: Tamamo and Inari
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAHHHH!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is too much! It's gonna upset<n>da kids!
We gotta tone it down!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The important thing is that people of<n>all ages can
have fun! Let's just go<n>with the comedy
version!
